name: Ginger Peaches
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup candied ginger root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch peaches for one minute. Peel, cut in half, and remove stone.
2. In a large saucepan, combine sugar, water, and wine. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to simmer. Add peach halves and ginger.
4. Simmer until peach halves are tender, about 20 minutes.
5. Serve warm or allow to cool in juice and serve chilled.
